role: First Minister of Defence of Islamic Republic; Freedom Movement co-founder abroad
bio: Engineer, guerrilla fighter, and political figure. Helped organize the [Freedom Movement of Iran](/orgs/freedom-movement-of-iran) from the United States. Trained with guerrilla movements in Egypt and Lebanon. Served as the first post-revolution Minister of Defence. Fought on the front lines in the [Iran–Iraq War](/events/iran-iraq-war) and was killed in action on 21 June 1981 in Dehlavieh, Khuzestan.
editorial_notes: KIA 21 June 1981. First post-revolution Defence Minister.
